description.source: Adapt your platform’s look and feel to your visual identity
description.target: Adapt your platform’s look and feel to your visual identity

body:0002.source: Platform branding helps create a consistent, recognizable, and engaging visual identity for your platform.
body:0002.target: Platform branding helps create a consistent, recognizable, and engaging visual identity for your platform.

body:0003.source: By aligning the platform’s colors, logo, banner, and other visuals with your organization’s identity, you build trust, familiarity, and a stronger connection with users. A well-branded platform not only looks professional but also reinforces your community’s values and helps users feel they’re in the right place.
body:0003.target: By aligning the platform’s colors, logo, banner, and other visuals with your organization’s identity, you build trust, familiarity, and a stronger connection with users. A well-branded platform not only looks professional but also reinforces your community’s values and helps users feel they’re in the right place.

body:0005.source: Build a consistent and accessible visual identity with well-chosen primary and secondary colors.
body:0005.target: Build a consistent and accessible visual identity with well-chosen primary and secondary colors.

body:0006.source: To change platform colours: go to Settings > Branding
body:0006.target: To change platform colours: go to Settings > Branding

body:0008.source: Keep it simple and high-contrast: choose only the most relevant colors that reflect your organization’s brand.
body:0008.target: Keep it simple and high-contrast: choose only the most relevant colors that reflect your organization’s brand.

body:0009.source: Primary color: defines the overall look of your platform. Choose a shade of red, blue, or green.
body:0009.target: Primary color: defines the overall look of your platform. Choose a shade of red, blue, or green.

body:0010.source: Secondary color: can match the primary color or be a complementary color (opposite on the color wheel).
body:0010.target: Secondary color: can match the primary color or be a complementary color (opposite on the color wheel).

body:0011.source: Text color: use black or another dark tone for readability.
body:0011.target: Text color: use black or another dark tone for readability.

body:0012.source: Overlay color: use your primary color to maintain visual consistency.
body:0012.target: Overlay color: use your primary color to maintain visual consistency.

body:0013.source: Avoid very light or white as your main color, it can make buttons and calls-to-action hard to see.
body:0013.target: Avoid very light or white as your main color, it can make buttons and calls-to-action hard to see.

body:0014.source: How to customize the font of your platform?
body:0014.target: How to customize the font of your platform?

body:0015.source: Font changes can’t be made directly in the Admin panel yet. Send the name of the font you want to use, preferably one available in the Adobe Fonts library. If it’s not available there, you can provide a CSS file containing the font instead.
body:0015.target: Font changes can’t be made directly in the Admin panel yet. Send the name of the font you want to use, preferably one available in the Adobe Fonts library. If it’s not available there, you can provide a CSS file containing the font instead.

body:0018.source: Include the name of the font.
body:0018.target: Include the name of the font.

body:0019.source: Verify the font is available in the Adobe Fonts library, or send a custom CSS file if not.
body:0019.target: Verify the font is available in the Adobe Fonts library, or send a custom CSS file if not.

body:0020.source: How to upload and configure your logo?
body:0020.target: How to upload and configure your logo?

body:0021.source: Make your platform instantly recognizable with your organization’s logo.
body:0021.target: Make your platform instantly recognizable with your organization’s logo.

body:0023.source: Go to Settings > Branding in the admin panel.
body:0023.target: Go to Settings > Branding in the admin panel.

body:0025.source: Click the upload box and select your organization’s logo image.
body:0025.target: Click the upload box and select your organization’s logo image.

body:0027.source: Minimum height: 45px (larger is fine, it will scale automatically).
body:0027.target: Minimum height: 45px (larger is fine, it will scale automatically).

body:0029.source: Aspect ratio: keep proportions consistent; width adjusts automatically.
body:0029.target: Aspect ratio: keep proportions consistent; width adjusts automatically.

body:0031.source: Use a simple logo with minimal text, as it scales differently on various screens.
body:0031.target: Use a simple logo with minimal text, as it scales differently on various screens.

body:0032.source: The footer logo automatically mirrors the navigation bar logo, it cannot be changed separately.
body:0032.target: The footer logo automatically mirrors the navigation bar logo, it cannot be changed separately.

body:0033.source: To add more visuals or information to the bottom of your homepage, go to Pages & menu > Edit (Home) > Edit (Bottom info section).
body:0033.target: To add more visuals or information to the bottom of your homepage, go to Pages & menu > Edit (Home) > Edit (Bottom info section).

body:0034.source: How to change the homepage banner?
body:0034.target: How to change the homepage banner?

body:0038.source: Select or add the Homepage banner widget
body:0038.target: Select or add the Homepage banner widget

body:0039.source: Upload a banner image that reflects your organization or community.
body:0039.target: Upload a banner image that reflects your organization or community.

body:0040.source: ℹ️ The homepage banner has a different view for guest visitors and logged in visitors, make sure to toggle the button to explore both views.
body:0040.target: ℹ️ The homepage banner has a different view for guest visitors and logged in visitors, make sure to toggle the button to explore both views.

body:0042.source: Aerial photo of your town or neighborhood.
body:0042.target: Aerial photo of your town or neighborhood.

body:0043.source: A picture from a local event or citizen assembly.
body:0043.target: A picture from a local event or citizen assembly.

body:0044.source: A symbolic image that represents your values or mission.
body:0044.target: A symbolic image that represents your values or mission.

body:0045.source: Optional: Add a color overlay to the banner image
body:0045.target: Optional: Add a color overlay to the banner image

body:0047.source: Look for the Enable overlay color setting.
body:0047.target: Look for the Enable overlay color setting.

body:0048.source: Choose a color that matches your platform’s theme.
body:0048.target: Choose a color that matches your platform’s theme.

body:0049.source: Use the Overlay opacity slider to make the image more or less visible behind the color.
body:0049.target: Use the Overlay opacity slider to make the image more or less visible behind the color.

body:0051.source: Your image is too bright or distracting and you cannot see the text anymore (which is white and the colour cannot be changed so you may need to use the color overlay for the white text to show)
body:0051.target: Your image is too bright or distracting and you cannot see the text anymore (which is white and the colour cannot be changed so you may need to use the color overlay for the white text to show)

body:0052.source: You want to unify the look with your platform colors
body:0052.target: You want to unify the look with your platform colors

body:0053.source: How to change the navigation bar colours?
body:0053.target: How to change the navigation bar colours?

body:0054.source: The navigation bar color can’t be changed directly in the Admin panel.
body:0054.target: The navigation bar color can’t be changed directly in the Admin panel.

body:0055.source: To change it (e.g., to a dark background), contact our support team using the chat bubble in the bottom-right of the Admin panel.
body:0055.target: To change it (e.g., to a dark background), contact our support team using the chat bubble in the bottom-right of the Admin panel.

body:0056.source: How to add a favicon to your platform?
body:0056.target: How to add a favicon to your platform?

body:0057.source: Your favicon is the small icon shown in the browser tab.
body:0057.target: Your favicon is the small icon shown in the browser tab.
